name: 威脅型——強權者的傲慢
description: 強勢方用財力、地位、家族權力威脅弱勢方。這類對白的套路是強調對方的無能和依附性，語氣居高臨下。這種對白的功能是拉高觀眾的憤怒值，為之後的打臉蓄能。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: You have never been on your own without me, without my family, without our money. How do you think you're going to survive?
